mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, product_id, quantity, price, status, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{status}, NOW())
INSERT INTO orders(id, user_id, product_id, quantity, price, status, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{status}, NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'Paid' ORDER BY create_time DESC;
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'Delivered' ORDER BY create_time DESC;
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'Pending' ORDER BY create_time DESC;
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'Pending' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET shipping_recipient = #{recipient}, shipping_phone = #{phone}, shipping_address = #{address}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.quantity AS orderQuantity, o.price AS orderPrice, o.status AS orderStatus, o.create_time AS orderCreateTime, p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.description AS productDescription, p.price AS productPrice, u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_recipient), ''), u.username) AS userUsername, u.email AS userEmail, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_phone), ''), u.phone) AS userPhone, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_address), ''), u.address) AS userAddress FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.quantity AS orderQuantity, o.price AS orderPrice, o.status AS orderStatus, o.create_time AS orderCreateTime, p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.description AS productDescription, p.price AS productPrice, u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_recipient), ''), u.username) AS userUsername, u.email AS userEmail, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_phone), ''), u.phone) AS userPhone, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_address), ''), u.address) AS userAddress FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC;

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.user_id AS orderUserId, o.product_id AS orderProductId, o.quantity AS orderQuantity, o.price AS orderPrice, o.status AS orderStatus, o.create_time AS orderCreateTime,
p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.description AS productDescription, p.price AS productPrice, p.image_name AS productImage,
u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_recipient), ''), u.username) AS userUsername, u.email AS userEmail, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_phone), ''), u.phone) AS userPhone, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_address), ''), u.address) AS userAddress
FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.user_id AS orderUserId, o.product_id AS orderProductId, o.quantity AS orderQuantity, o.price AS orderPrice, o.status AS orderStatus, o.create_time AS orderCreateTime, p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.description AS productDescription, p.price AS productPrice, p.image_name AS productImage, u.id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_recipient), ''), u.username) AS userUsername, u.email AS userEmail, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_phone), ''), u.phone) AS userPhone, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(o.shipping_address), ''), u.address) AS userAddress FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE create_time > #{after}
